productDisplayName: Palm Tree Kids Boys Printed Brown Tshirts
description: Composition Dark brown T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed round neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, yellow stitch detailing on the shoulders, short sleeves, distressed look print on the front and brand tab attached to the left hem on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detatchable accessories Get your little one ready for the outdoors with this dark brown T-shirt from palm tree. The distressed look graphic on the front of the Wolf Ridge Expedition and the words "Save the earth, the forest and biodiversity" gives this a dose of environment friendly vibe. Team this with jeans and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on the skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
